narrative:
Jackson Township has 1,749 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.1 percentage points.
